company_core.name: Periodic Labs
company_core.description: The main product consists of AI scientists and autonomous laboratories designed to conduct experiments that generate high-quality data, particularly in the physical sciences. This technology utilizes advanced AI methodologies to improve materials design, with specific applications in superconductors and semiconductor manufacturing.

founders.name: Ekin Dogus Cubuk
founders.background:
Ekin Dogus Cubuk served as a Research Scientist at Google DeepMind from 2017 to 2025, where he contributed to advanced AI research. Prior to that, he was a Postdoctoral Research Fellow at Stanford University from 2016 to 2017. He holds a Bachelor of Science in Physics and Engineering from Swarthmore College and a Master of Arts in Condensed Matter and Materials Physics from Harvard University.

---
Sources: linkedin.com/in/ekin-dogus-cubuk-9148b8114

founders.name: William (Liam) Fedus
founders.background:
William (Liam) Fedus has a strong background in AI and deep learning, having served as a Research Scientist at Google Brain from 2020 to 2022, where he focused on deep learning research. He was a key contributor to the development of ChatGPT while working at OpenAI, first as a Member of Technical Staff and later as VP of Research for Post-Training. Liam holds a PhD in Computer Science from Université de Montréal, where he studied under notable figures like Hugo Larochelle and Yoshua Bengio, and also earned a Master's degree in Elementary Particle Physics from UC San Diego.

---
Sources: linkedin.com/in/william-liam-fedus-26547811

agent_output.markdown:
# Periodic Labs | Meeting Brief
*2026-03-03*

# Meeting Briefing: Periodic Labs

---

## TL;DR
Periodic Labs builds AI scientists and autonomous laboratories to conduct experiments and generate high-quality data for physical sciences applications, including superconductors and semiconductor manufacturing. [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/35555342) The company raised a $300M seed round in September 2025 — a striking figure for a seed-stage company — backed by Andreessen Horowitz, Felicis, Bain Capital Ventures, Quiet Capital, and Lightspeed Venture Partners. [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/35555342) Headcount has grown 44.4% in 90 days, signaling aggressive early scaling. [[4]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/35555342)

---

## Why This Meeting Matters
• **Exceptional seed round size:** A $300M seed raise in 2025 from a blue-chip syndicate (a16z, Lightspeed, BCV) is a strong signal of outsized investor conviction in the autonomous lab / AI-for-science thesis. [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/35555342)
• **Rapid team scaling:** 44.4% headcount growth in 90 days — from a base of ~39 employees — indicates the company is deploying capital quickly and building out core capabilities at pace. [[4]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/35555342)
• **Founder pedigree in frontier AI:** Co-founders bring direct experience from Google DeepMind, Google Brain, and OpenAI (including VP of Research for Post-Training at OpenAI), positioning the team at the intersection of cutting-edge AI and physical sciences. [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/35555342)
• **High-value application domains:** Focus on superconductors and semiconductor manufacturing targets sectors with significant national security and industrial relevance, which may support non-dilutive funding pathways and strategic partnerships. [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/35555342)

---

## Company Snapshot
| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Founded | 2025 |
| HQ | Not found in table |
| Employees | 39 (+44.4% 90d) |
| Products | AI scientists and autonomous laboratories for physical sciences experimentation and materials design |
| Customers | B2B |
| Total Funding | $300,000,000 |
| Last Round | $300,000,000 — September 2025 |
*Last updated: 2025-09-30*

---

## Founders

**Ekin Dogus Cubuk** — Co-Founder | linkedin.com/in/ekin-dogus-cubuk-9148b8114
Research Scientist at Google DeepMind from 2017 to 2025, contributing to advanced AI research, preceded by a postdoctoral fellowship at Stanford University (2016–2017). [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/35555342) He holds a BS in Physics and Engineering from Swarthmore College and an MA in Condensed Matter and Materials Physics from Harvard University — a rare combination of deep physics domain expertise and frontier AI experience directly relevant to Periodic Labs' core thesis. [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/35555342)

**William (Liam) Fedus** — Co-Founder | linkedin.com/in/william-liam-fedus-26547811
Fedus was a Research Scientist at Google Brain (2020–2022) and a key contributor to ChatGPT at OpenAI, where he rose to VP of Research for Post-Training. [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/35555342) He holds a PhD in Computer Science from Université de Montréal (supervised by Hugo Larochelle and Yoshua Bengio) and an MS in Elementary Particle Physics from UC San Diego, giving him both elite AI research credentials and a physics foundation. [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/35555342)

---

## Key Signals
• **[Hiring]** Rapid headcount growth of 44.4% over 90 days — indicates aggressive post-funding team buildout. — Source: Periodic Labs Key Signals [[4]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/35555342), 2025
• **[Funding]** $300M seed round closed September 30, 2025 — current stage listed as Seed. — Source: Periodic Labs Company Profile [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/35555342), 2025-09-30
• **[Web Traffic]** Website traffic down 17.4% over 30 days — worth monitoring; may reflect early-stage site immaturity or a shift away from inbound marketing at this stage. — Source: Periodic Labs Recent Updates [[1]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/35555342), 2025

---

## In the News
**No recent news available.**
No historical change data or news articles were present in the provided sources. [[1]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/35555342)

---

## Meeting Prep

**Key questions to ask:**
• The seed round is $300M — an extraordinary amount for a seed stage. What is the intended use of capital, and what milestones does the team need to hit before a Series A? What does the burn rate look like given 39 employees? [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/35555342)
• Liam Fedus comes from large-scale language model research (ChatGPT, Google Brain), while Ekin Cubuk's background is in condensed matter physics and AI at DeepMind. How are the co-founders dividing responsibilities, and how does their combined expertise map onto the product roadmap for autonomous labs? [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/35555342)
• Web traffic is down 17.4% in 30 days despite a major funding event. Is the company intentionally operating in stealth or limiting inbound exposure, and what does the current go-to-market strategy look like for B2B customers in semiconductors and superconductors? [[1]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/35555342)[[4]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/35555342)

**Recommended next step:** Request a product demo of the autonomous laboratory platform and ask for at least one concrete example of an experiment conducted, including the data output quality benchmarks used — this will validate whether the core technical claims are at proof-of-concept or production stage.
